final:
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input [2:0] addr,
    input [3:0] din,
    input en,
    input we,
    output reg [3:0] dout
);reg [3:0] invalid_memory [0:7];

always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (en) begin
        if (we) begin
            invalid_memory[addr] <= din;
        end else begin
            dout <= invalid_memory[addr];
        end
    end
end

endmodule
